label: Beta 1.4.9
notes: Beta 1.4.9 — Waveform polish. In the Premiere & Resolve panels, audio in the Asset Library is now laid out exactly like the Sound/Music tab: play on the left, title with genre · BPM, a wide click-to-seek waveform, then favourite / add / reveal — so every audio surface reads the same. Waveforms now stay crisp on large or widened screens (no more low-quality stretching) and paint instantly when you open a tab instead of flashing in a moment late. Includes everything from Beta 1.4.8 (reorganised Sound page columns, click-to-seek panel waveforms) and 1.4.7 (on-device Visual Search, ⌘C / ⌘V to copy real asset files).
